caption: Table 77. Document revision history
rows: Added the number of comparators in the document title. Updated the position of VSSA/VREF- pin in WLCSP49 package in Table 12: STM32F318x8 pin definitions. Added the maximum value for wake up time from stop mode in Table 33: Low-power mode wakeup timings.

Applied the following changes: – updated the comparator analog supply range in Features, – added "Interconnect matrix" in Features, – added some information related to timers in Table 1: STM32F318x8 device features and peripheral counts – updated Section 3.5.1: Power supply schemes and added Table 2: External analog supply values for analog peripherals, – added the last footnote to Table 12: STM32F318x8 pin definitions, – updated Table 43: HSI oscillator characteristics and Figure 19: HSI oscillator accuracy characterization results for soldered parts, – updated V min value in Table 69: Comparator characteristics, DDA – updated Table 27: Typical and maximum V consumption in Stop mode, DDA – updated Table 33: Low-power mode wakeup timings, – updated UFQFPN32 and WLCSP49 marking in Chapter 7: Package information.

Updated: – the order of columns in Table 25: Typical and maximum current consumption from the V supply, DDA – Table 41: HSE oscillator characteristics, – Table 46: Flash memory characteristics, – Table 52: NPOR pin characteristics, – Table 69: Comparator characteristics. Added: – Figure 35: Maximum V scaler startup time from power down. REFINT

Added LQFP48 package, updated the following: – Section 2: Description, – Table 1: STM32F318x8 device features and peripheral counts, – Table 12: STM32F318x8 pin definitions, – Table 23: General operating conditions, – Table 50: ESD absolute maximum ratings, – Table 80: Package thermal characteristics, – Table 81: Ordering information scheme. Added: – Figure 5: STM32F318x8 LQFP48 pinout, – Section 7.3: LQFP48 package information.

– Updated all document table notes by removing the "not tested in production" specification. – Updated V line on Table 27: Embedded internal reference voltage. REFINT – Updated "Conditions" column on Table 42: LSE oscillator characteristics (f = LSE 32.768 kHz). – Added CMIR and t lines on Table 63: ADC characteristics. STAB – Updated R line on Table 68: DAC characteristics. LOAD – Updated VOH and VOL lines on Table 70: Operational amplifier characteristics SAT SAT – Added Section 7.4: UFQFPN32 package information note 2. – Updated Section 7: Package information adding information about other optional marking or inset/upset marks. – Updated note 1 below all the package device marking figures. – Updated Table 52: I/O current injection susceptibility note by 'injection is not possible'. – Updated Figure 25: Recommended NRST pin protection note about the 0.1uF capacitor.
Updated: – Section 7.2: LQFP48 package information – Section 7.3: UFQFPN32 package information – New Section 9: Important security notice
